witnesses.description: Reduction modulo 2 as a group homomorphism from Z/4Z to Z/2Z.
The quotient of Z/4Z by the parity kernel and the induced isomorphism to Z/2Z.
Reduction modulo 2 as a unital ring homomorphism from Z/4Z to Z/2Z.

checks.claim: Reduction modulo 2 preserves addition from Z/4Z to Z/2Z.
checks.notes: The validator checks every pair a,b and verifies f(a+b) = f(a)+f(b) in the codomain table.

checks.claim: The listed kernel and image of the parity homomorphism are correct.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the kernel as the preimage of the codomain identity and the image as the map range.

checks.claim: The quotient by the parity kernel is isomorphic to the image via the listed induced map.
checks.notes: The validator checks cosets, quotient operation, well-defined induced map, bijectivity onto the image, and homomorphism preservation.

checks.claim: Reduction modulo 2 preserves zero, one, addition, and multiplication from Z/4Z to Z/2Z.
checks.notes: The validator checks every pair for both addition and multiplication, plus zero and one preservation.

checks.claim: A homomorphism-preservation equality is stable under congruent source elements.

data.certificate: prove_qf_uf_unsat_alethe emits Evidence::UnsatAletheProof checked by Evidence::check with no trusted reduction step

checks.notes: The SMT-LIB artifact asserts a homomorphism-preservation equality at one source pair, equates a congruent second pair, and refutes preservation for that second pair. Axeyum emits a pure EUF Alethe refutation for the congruence/transitivity conflict.

checks.claim: The listed map from Z/4Z to Z/2Z is a group homomorphism.
checks.notes: The validator checks the pair 1+1: the map sends 2 to 1, while f(1)+f(1) is 0 in Z/2Z.

checks.claim: The malformed finite group map cannot satisfy homomorphism preservation at 1+1.

data.certificate: prove_qf_uf_unsat_alethe emits Evidence::UnsatAletheProof checked by Evidence::check with no trusted reduction step

checks.notes: Finite replay identifies the bad pair 1+1: phi(2)=1 while phi(1)+phi(1)=0. The linked QF_UF artifact isolates that operation-preservation equality and checks the contradiction through Alethe evidence.

checks.claim: General algebraic isomorphism theorems and structure-theory claims require future proof resources.

data.target_theorem_shape: group and ring isomorphism theorems, normal-subgroup/ideal quotient theory, module homomorphisms, categorical universal properties, and infinite algebra
data.future_checker: Lean modules for algebraic structures, quotients, kernels, images, first isomorphism theorems, and proof reconstruction from finite table certificates

checks.notes: The finite rows are checked by table replay; general algebraic structure theory remains a proof-assistant horizon.
